humanOversight.basedOnAvailableInformation: Según la información disponible, Aipify ofrece apoyo a la decisión — no certeza.
humanOversight.aipifyEstimates: Aipify estima resultados usando señales organizacionales, patrones históricos y contexto del Centro de conocimiento.
humanOversight.reviewBeforeExecution: Esta recomendación debe revisarse antes de ejecutarse. Las personas conservan la responsabilidad.

riskAnalysis.riskRationale: Why this risk level was assigned

decisionSupport.ifIgnored: What happens if we ignore this?

widgets.empty: No items in this view right now.

faq.title: Impact Analysis FAQ
faq.whatIsImpactAnalysisAnswer: Impact Analysis explains expected outcomes, risks, effort, and confidence before you approve an Aipify action.
faq.howEstimateOutcomesAnswer: Aipify combines organizational signals, similar past actions, Knowledge Center context, and approval history — always as estimates.
faq.canPredictFutureAnswer: No. Aipify provides decision support based on available information. Actual results depend on your decisions and operating context.
faq.confidenceScoresAnswer: Confidence reflects data availability, historical success rates, similar actions, Knowledge Center alignment, and human validation patterns.
faq.whoResponsible: ¿Quién sigue siendo responsable de las decisiones?
faq.whoResponsibleAnswer: You and your organization. Aipify prepares and explains recommendations — humans approve, execute, and remain accountable.

auditPreview.intro: This action will generate audit records.

relatedActions.similarExecuted: {count} similar actions executed in your workspace

impactAnalysis.principle: Trust grows through transparency — Aipify explains what will happen, who is affected, and how recovery is handled.

approvalDelegation.centerSubtitle: Enterprise approval workflows, delegation, SLA monitoring, and accountability trails for Aipify actions.
approvalDelegation.humanOversight: Aipify may recommend approvers and delegates. Aipify never approves on behalf of humans unless explicitly authorized by governance settings.

recommendations.intro: Optional delegate recommendations based on role permissions, department responsibility, and expertise.

widgets.empty: No items in this view right now.

faq.title: Approvals & Delegation FAQ
faq.whatIsDelegationAnswer: Delegation assigns review or execution responsibility to another role while preserving a full accountability trail.
faq.whatIsWorkflowAnswer: An approval workflow defines how many approvers are required and whether steps run in sequence, in parallel, or at executive level.
faq.autoApproveAnswer: No by default. Aipify recommends and prepares actions. Humans approve unless explicit governance settings authorize otherwise.
faq.howApproversSelectedAnswer: Based on action category, risk level, estimated impact, department ownership, and organization policies — with optional Aipify recommendations.
faq.delayedApprovals: What happens when approvals are delayed?
faq.delayedApprovalsAnswer: SLA monitoring tracks waiting time, surfaces bottlenecks, and supports escalation. Organizations retain authority over final decisions.

approvalDelegation.principle: Aipify supports decision processes. Organizations retain authority.

executionCoordination.centerSubtitle: Track approved actions from initiation to completion with ownership, dependencies, blockers, and accountability.
executionCoordination.humanOversight: Aipify coordinates execution. Humans remain responsible for execution decisions. Confidence scores are estimates — not certainty.

priority.recommendation: Priority recommendations consider business impact, risk, alignment, and deadlines. Executives retain final authority.

confidence.disclaimer: Based on available information — Aipify estimates execution confidence; this is not a guarantee.

collaboration.placeholder: Share a progress update, decision, or note for the team…

learning.intro: Help Aipify improve future execution recommendations by sharing what happened after completion.
learning.submitted: Thank you — your feedback improves future execution coordination.

widgets.empty: No items in this view right now.

faq.title: Execution Coordination FAQ
faq.whatIsCoordinationAnswer: Execution coordination tracks approved actions from assignment through completion with ownership, dependencies, blockers, and timelines.
faq.howTrackProgressAnswer: Through lifecycle stages, collaboration logs, milestones, SLA indicators, and immutable audit records — all visible in the Execution Coordination Center.
faq.autoExecuteAnswer: Only within approved Autonomous Execution Framework limits. Coordination tracks progress; humans retain execution accountability.
faq.whenBlocked: What happens when actions become blocked?
faq.whenBlockedAnswer: Blockers are registered with category, severity, owner, and resolution plan. Stakeholders are notified and leadership visibility is updated.
faq.confidenceScores: How are execution confidence scores calculated?
faq.confidenceScoresAnswer: From resource availability, historical completion, dependency stability, complexity, and workload — always as estimates, never certainty.

executionCoordination.empty: No execution items to coordinate right now.
executionCoordination.principle: Aipify coordinates execution. Humans remain responsible for execution decisions.

strategicInitiativePortfolio.centerSubtitle: Connect approved actions, execution progress, business priorities, and executive goals in one strategic overview.
strategicInitiativePortfolio.humanOversight: Aipify supports strategic decisions. Humans retain responsibility and authority. Confidence and alignment scores are estimates — not certainty.

confidence.disclaimer: Based on available information — estimates only, not guarantees.

widgets.empty: No initiatives in this view right now.

decisionSupport.title: Decision support
decisionSupport.ifDelayed: What happens if it is delayed?

learning.intro: After completion, share what happened to improve future initiative recommendations.
learning.submitted: Thank you — your feedback improves future portfolio guidance.

faq.title: Strategic Initiative Portfolio FAQ
faq.whatIsInitiativeAnswer: A strategic initiative is an approved action or program tracked against business goals, ownership, execution progress, and portfolio health.
faq.howPrioritizeAnswer: Aipify considers risk, alignment score, strategic value, deadlines, and executive priority — executives retain final authority.
faq.whatIsAlignmentAnswer: Alignment shows how an initiative connects to business goals, departments, sponsors, and expected strategic value.
faq.portfolioHealthAnswer: Health indicates whether initiatives are on track, at risk, blocked, overdue, or completed across your portfolio.
faq.whoOwnsAnswer: Each initiative has an assigned owner and optional executive sponsor. Humans retain accountability — Aipify coordinates visibility.
faq.howEstimateRisk: How does Aipify estimate initiative risk?
faq.howEstimateRiskAnswer: From risk concentration, blockers, missing owners, unclear outcomes, and confidence levels — always as guidance, not certainty.
faq.canAipifyDecide: Can Aipify decide which initiatives to execute?
faq.canAipifyDecideAnswer: No. Aipify supports strategic decisions with visibility and recommendations. Humans retain responsibility and authority.

strategicInitiativePortfolio.empty: No strategic initiatives to display right now.
strategicInitiativePortfolio.principle: Aipify supports strategic decisions. Humans retain responsibility and authority.

executiveStrategicDecisionCockpit.subtitle: Real-time overview of critical decisions, organizational health, strategic execution, and emerging risks requiring leadership attention.
executiveStrategicDecisionCockpit.humanOversight: Aipify supports executives. Executives remain accountable for organizational decisions. Confidence scores are estimates — not certainty.
executiveStrategicDecisionCockpit.principle: Aipify supports executives. Executives remain accountable for organizational decisions.

faq.title: Executive Decision Cockpit FAQ
faq.whatIsCockpit: What is the Executive Strategic Decision Cockpit?
faq.whatIsCockpitAnswer: A leadership view surfacing critical decisions, portfolio health, alerts, opportunities, and briefings — integrated with Action Center execution data.
faq.howPrioritize: How does Aipify prioritize executive attention?
faq.howPrioritizeAnswer: By urgency, risk level, strategic impact, deadlines, and escalations — always as guidance for executives who retain final authority.
faq.howOpportunitiesAnswer: From approved actions, portfolio alignment, impact analysis, and operational patterns — presented with benefit, effort, and confidence estimates.
faq.canAipifyDecideAnswer: No. Aipify prepares briefings and surfaces priorities. Executives remain accountable for organizational decisions.
faq.confidenceScoresAnswer: From risk, dependency stability, historical patterns, and workload indicators — always as estimates, never certainty.

organizationalEarlyWarning.title: Centro de alerta temprana
organizationalEarlyWarning.subtitle: Identify emerging risks, declining trends, hidden bottlenecks, and opportunities before they become major problems.
organizationalEarlyWarning.humanOversight: Aipify identifies patterns and signals. Humans remain responsible for interpretation and action. Forecasts are estimates — not guarantees.
organizationalEarlyWarning.principle: Aipify identifies patterns and signals. Humans remain responsible for interpretation and action.
organizationalEarlyWarning.empty: No early warning signals detected right now.

upgrade.title: Upgrade for Early Warning Center
upgrade.body: Predictive signals and early warning capabilities are available on Business and Enterprise plans.

forecasts.title: Organizational health forecasting
forecasts.disclaimer: Forecasts are estimates based on current patterns — not guarantees.

opportunities.title: Opportunity detection
opportunities.empty: No positive signals identified right now.

queue.title: Executive attention queue
queue.empty: No signals require immediate leadership attention.

faq.title: Early Warning FAQ
faq.whatAreSignalsAnswer: Patterns detected from operational data — delays, blockers, approvals, and execution trends — surfaced before they become crises.
faq.canPredictAnswer: No. Aipify estimates trends and forecasts from available patterns. All outputs are guidance — not guarantees.
faq.howGeneratedAnswer: From Action Center execution data, portfolio health, approval backlogs, blockers, and organizational health indicators.
faq.howRespond: How should leaders respond to warnings?
faq.howRespondAnswer: Review briefings, acknowledge or escalate signals, assign owners, and document decisions. Humans interpret and act.
faq.confidenceLevelsAnswer: From signal severity, data availability, and historical pattern strength — always as estimates.

boardInvestorIntelligence.title: Inteligencia de junta e inversores
boardInvestorIntelligence.subtitle: Board-ready intelligence on organizational performance, strategic execution, risks, opportunities, and long-term readiness.
boardInvestorIntelligence.humanOversight: Aipify strengthens governance and strategic awareness. Human leadership remains responsible for decisions. Investor indicators are illustrative — not audited financial reporting.
boardInvestorIntelligence.principle: Aipify strengthens governance and strategic awareness. Human leadership remains responsible for decisions.

upgrade.body: Board and investor intelligence is available on Business and Enterprise plans.

investor.title: Investor readiness dashboard
investor.revenueNote: Illustrative indicator — not audited financial reporting

performance.title: Strategic performance indicators
performance.note: Indicators are governance proxies — not audited financial metrics.

briefing.title: Investor intelligence briefing
briefing.disclaimer: Not financial advice or audited reporting.

scenarios.title: Scenario awareness
scenarios.certaintyNote: Scenarios are exploratory possibilities — Aipify does not claim certainty.

faq.title: Board Intelligence FAQ
faq.whatIsBoardAnswer: Board-ready intelligence transforming operational and strategic data into governance insights for leadership, boards, and investors.
faq.governanceSupport: How does Aipify support executive governance?
faq.governanceSupportAnswer: Through decision registers, governance health assessments, meeting summaries, and audit trails integrated with Action Center and Early Warning systems.
faq.replaceDecisionsAnswer: No. Aipify prepares intelligence and documentation. Human leadership and boards retain decision authority.
faq.investorInsightsAnswer: From execution outcomes, portfolio health, and governance patterns — always as illustrative indicators, not audited financials.
faq.confidenceScores: How should leaders interpret confidence scores?
faq.confidenceScoresAnswer: As estimates of data quality and pattern strength — never as guarantees of outcomes.

enterpriseTransformationChange.title: Centro de transformación y cambio
enterpriseTransformationChange.subtitle: Navigate strategic change with readiness assessments, adoption intelligence, resistance support, and executive transformation briefings.
enterpriseTransformationChange.humanOversight: Aipify supports transformation efforts. People remain at the center of organizational change. Resistance signals are supportive — never punitive or surveillance-based.
enterpriseTransformationChange.principle: Aipify supports transformation efforts. People remain at the center of organizational change.

upgrade.title: Upgrade for Transformation & Change Intelligence
upgrade.body: Transformation and change intelligence is available on Business and Enterprise plans.

adoption.title: Adoption intelligence
adoption.departmentNotes: Department indicators are aggregated — not individual surveillance.

resistance.title: Resistance monitoring
resistance.empty: No resistance signals detected — continue monitoring adoption and communication.

briefing.title: Executive transformation briefing
briefing.disclaimer: Transformation intelligence supports leaders — not automated change management.

faq.title: Transformation & Change FAQ
faq.whatIsTransformationAnswer: Strategic change initiatives including digital transformation, restructuring, process change, and cultural evolution — supported by readiness and adoption intelligence.
faq.whyFailAnswer: Often due to underestimated human complexity, poor communication, insufficient readiness, and lack of executive sponsorship — areas Aipify helps leaders monitor.
faq.howSupport: How does Aipify support change initiatives?
faq.howSupportAnswer: Through readiness assessments, adoption tracking, resistance support, stakeholder mapping, and briefings integrated with Decision Cockpit, Portfolio, and Early Warning.
faq.autoManageAnswer: No. Aipify prepares intelligence and recommendations. Leaders and teams drive change — people remain at the center.
faq.respondResistance: How should leaders respond to resistance?
faq.respondResistanceAnswer: With supportive engagement — address concerns, remove blockers, improve communication, and provide enablement. Signals are never punitive.
faq.readinessAssessmentsAnswer: From leadership alignment, communication effectiveness, resource availability, training readiness, and governance patterns — as governance indicators, not surveillance.

executiveInsights.title: Executive Insights
executiveInsights.subtitle: A concise overview of organizational health, priorities, risks, opportunities, and recommended next steps — decision support, not analytics.
executiveInsights.loading: Aipify is preparing your Executive Insights…
executiveInsights.principle: Executive Insights supports decision-making. Final decisions remain under human control.
executiveInsights.accessDeniedBody: Executive Insights is available to organization owners, administrators, and managers. Standard team members cannot access this area.
executiveInsights.emptyBody: Executive Insights will become more valuable as Aipify learns how your organization operates.

faq.title: Executive Insights FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: Executive Insights provides leaders with a concise overview of organizational health, priorities, risks, opportunities, and recommended next steps generated from activity across the Aipify ecosystem.
faq.autoDecisions: Does Executive Insights make decisions automatically?
faq.autoDecisionsAnswer: No. Executive Insights supports decision-making by presenting information and recommendations. Final decisions remain under human control.
faq.updateFrequency: How often are Executive Insights updated?
faq.updateFrequencyAnswer: Insights are refreshed automatically as new events occur throughout your organization.

followUps.title: Organizational Memory & Follow-Up Center
followUps.subtitle: Remember commitments, track important follow-ups, and prevent important actions from being forgotten.
followUps.principle: Aipify provides reminders and recommendations. Humans remain responsible for organizational commitments.
followUps.emptyBody: Aipify will help your organization remember important commitments and next steps.

suggestions.requiresReview: Suggestions require human review — nothing is escalated automatically.

form.title: New follow-up
form.titlePlaceholder: What needs to be followed up?

faq.title: Follow-Up Center FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Follow-Up Center helps organizations remember commitments, track unfinished actions, and ensure important responsibilities receive appropriate attention.
faq.autoCompleteAnswer: No. Aipify provides reminders and recommendations, but humans remain responsible for reviewing and completing organizational commitments.
faq.assignment: Can follow-ups be assigned to specific team members?
faq.assignmentAnswer: Yes. Follow-ups can be assigned to individuals to improve accountability and visibility across the organization.

decisionCenter.title: Decision Center
decisionCenter.subtitle: Document important decisions, preserve context, and evaluate outcomes over time.
decisionCenter.loading: Aipify is reviewing organizational decision history…
decisionCenter.principle: Aipify supports human decision-making through documentation and organizational memory. Final authority always remains with people.
decisionCenter.emptyTitle: No decisions have been documented yet.
decisionCenter.emptyBody: Aipify helps organizations preserve institutional knowledge by documenting important decisions.
decisionCenter.readOnly: You have read-only access to the Decision Center.

suggestions.requiresReview: Recommendations require human review — Aipify never makes organizational decisions.

faq.title: Decision Center FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Decision Center helps organizations document important decisions, preserve context, and evaluate outcomes over time.
faq.whyDocumentAnswer: Documenting decisions reduces knowledge loss, improves accountability, and helps future leaders understand the reasoning behind previous actions.
faq.autoDecideAnswer: No. Aipify supports human decision-making through documentation, recommendations, and organizational memory. Final authority always remains with people.

activityHistory.title: Action Timeline & Activity History
activityHistory.subtitle: A chronological view of important organizational activity across your Aipify workspace.
activityHistory.loading: Aipify is preparing your activity history…
activityHistory.principle: Activity History preserves organizational accountability. Important audit records remain available for transparency and compliance.
activityHistory.emptyTitle: No activity has been recorded yet.
activityHistory.emptyBody: Aipify will show important organizational activity here as your workspace becomes active.

faq.title: Activity History FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: Activity History gives your organization a chronological overview of important actions, updates, decisions, approvals and system events across Aipify.
faq.whoCanSeeAnswer: Access depends on role permissions. Owners and administrators can view broader activity, while team members only see activity they are authorized to access.
faq.canDeleteAnswer: Important audit and activity records should remain available for accountability, compliance and organizational memory.

supportRequests.title: Support Request Center
supportRequests.subtitle: Contact Aipify Support, track requests, and receive structured assistance for your organization.
supportRequests.loading: Aipify is loading your support requests…
supportRequests.principle: Aipify Support keeps your organization requests organized with clear status, priority and accountability.
supportRequests.emptyBody: When your organization needs help, Aipify Support will keep requests organized here.

detail.commentsPlaceholder: Comments will be available in a future update — prepared for Aipify Support AI integration.
detail.internalNotesPlaceholder: Internal notes for administrators — prepared for future support workflows.
detail.attachmentsPlaceholder: File attachments will be supported in a future update.

faq.title: Support Request Center FAQ
faq.howContact: How do I contact Aipify Support?
faq.howContactAnswer: You can create a support request from the Support Request Center. Aipify organizes your request, category, priority and status so your organization can follow progress clearly.
faq.canTrackAnswer: Yes. Each support request includes status, priority, category, timestamps and related activity so your organization can follow progress.
faq.whoCanSeeAnswer: Support request access depends on organization permissions. Owners and administrators can view organization support requests, while team members only see requests they are authorized to access.

supportAssistant.title: Support Assistant
supportAssistant.subtitle: Find answers from the Knowledge Center before creating a support request.
supportAssistant.loading: Aipify is searching the Knowledge Center…
supportAssistant.emptyPrompt: Ask Aipify Support anything about setup, billing, integrations or Business Packs.
supportAssistant.searchPlaceholder: Search setup, billing, integrations, Business Packs…
supportAssistant.noResults: No matching articles found. Try a different search or create a support request.
supportAssistant.principle: Aipify Support Assistant helps you find guidance from approved Knowledge Center content. Human support remains available when you need it.

contactSupport.title: How do I contact Aipify Support?
contactSupport.summary: Use the Support Request Center to reach Aipify with a clear summary of your question.
contactSupport.step1: Open Support → Support Requests in the APP navigation.
contactSupport.step2: Select the category that best matches your question.
contactSupport.step3: Submit your request — your organization can track status and priority.

connectIntegration.title: How do I connect an integration?
connectIntegration.summary: Connect external platforms from APP Platform → Integrations with read-only access by default.
connectIntegration.step1: Open APP Platform → Integrations in the APP navigation.
connectIntegration.step2: Choose a platform and review the permission scopes Aipify requests.
connectIntegration.step3: Complete setup and test the connection before using it in your workspace.

manageSubscription.title: How do I manage my subscription?
manageSubscription.summary: Review and manage your organization subscription under Billing in the APP navigation.
manageSubscription.step1: Open Billing → Subscription to view your current plan.
manageSubscription.step2: Review licensed modules and billing status for your organization.
manageSubscription.step3: Contact an owner or admin if plan changes require approval.

inviteTeamMembers.title: How do I invite team members?
inviteTeamMembers.summary: Organization owners and admins manage team access from Organization → Team Members.
inviteTeamMembers.step2: Review current members and organization roles.
inviteTeamMembers.step3: Use invitation workflows when available — admins control workspace access.

installBusinessPack.title: How do I install a Business Pack?
installBusinessPack.summary: Business Packs are licensed modules your organization can enable on top of your subscription.
installBusinessPack.step1: Open Business Packs → Available Business Packs.
installBusinessPack.step2: Review packs included in your subscription tier.
installBusinessPack.step3: Install or enable packs — owners and admins manage licensing.

upgradePlan.title: How do I upgrade my plan?
upgradePlan.summary: Compare plans and upgrade options under Billing → Upgrade Options.
upgradePlan.step2: Compare capabilities included in each plan tier.
upgradePlan.step3: Complete upgrade with owner or admin approval when required.

faq.title: Support Assistant FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: Aipify Support Assistant helps customers find answers from the Knowledge Center before creating a support request.
faq.replacesHuman: Does Support Assistant replace human support?
faq.replacesHumanAnswer: No. The Support Assistant helps users find guidance faster, but customers can still create support requests when human assistance is needed.
faq.canCreateRequest: Can Support Assistant create a support request?
faq.canCreateRequestAnswer: The Support Assistant can help prepare support request context, but the user must confirm before a request is created.

successCenter.principle: Aipify provides advisory success insights to help your organization grow — final decisions always remain with people.

overview.advisory: Scores and indicators are advisory. Use them alongside human judgment when planning next steps.

faq.title: Success Center FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Success Center helps organizations understand adoption, engagement and opportunities to get more value from Aipify.
faq.healthScore: How is the Health Score calculated?
faq.healthScoreAnswer: The Health Score is based on organizational activity, engagement, adoption patterns and operational indicators available within Aipify.
faq.predictRiskAnswer: Aipify provides recommendations and risk indicators based on available information, but final decisions should always involve human judgment.

faq.title: Getting Started FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: Getting Started helps organizations configure Aipify correctly and accelerate adoption through guided onboarding.
faq.requiredSteps: Do I need to complete every onboarding step?
faq.requiredStepsAnswer: Some onboarding steps are optional, while others help improve security, collaboration and long-term success.
faq.revisitAnswer: Yes. Organizations can return to Getting Started at any time to complete remaining setup tasks.

faq.title: Capability Center FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Capability Center helps organizations understand their operational maturity and identify opportunities for continuous improvement.
faq.howDeterminedAnswer: Maturity levels combine operational signals, feature adoption and optional self-assessments to provide improvement guidance.
faq.comparison: Is this a comparison against other organizations?
faq.comparisonAnswer: No. The Capability Center focuses on your organization's own growth and development over time.

organizationalGoals.title: Goals & Objectives
organizationalGoals.subtitle: Define, track and review strategic and operational goals — organizational alignment, not project management.
organizationalGoals.loading: Aipify is reviewing your organizational objectives…
organizationalGoals.principle: Organizational alignment through clear goals — human teams remain responsible for execution.
organizationalGoals.emptyTitle: No organizational goals have been created yet.
organizationalGoals.emptyBody: Aipify helps organizations align around meaningful objectives and track progress over time.

recommendations.assignContributors: Assign additional contributors to strengthen accountability.
recommendations.linkFollowUps: Link related follow-ups to connect actions with outcomes.
recommendations.celebrateCompleted: Celebrate completed objectives with your team.
recommendations.updateProgress: Update progress status to maintain alignment.

faq.title: Goals & Objectives FAQ
faq.whatIs: What is the Goals & Objectives Center?
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Goals & Objectives Center helps organizations define priorities, track progress and align teams around meaningful outcomes.
faq.updated: Can goals be updated over time?
faq.updatedAnswer: Yes. Goals evolve as organizations learn, adapt and achieve milestones. Progress updates help maintain alignment and accountability.
faq.autoCompleteAnswer: No. Aipify supports organizations with visibility, recommendations and progress tracking. Human teams remain responsible for execution.

responsibilities.title: Responsibilities
responsibilities.subtitle: Clarify who owns what across goals, decisions, follow-ups, approvals and operational areas.
responsibilities.principle: Clear ownership reduces ambiguity — human administrators assign responsibility.
responsibilities.emptyTitle: No responsibilities have been assigned yet.
responsibilities.emptyBody: Aipify helps your organization clarify ownership so important work does not fall between roles.

recommendations.assignOwner: Assign an owner to this area.
recommendations.addBackupOwner: Add a backup owner to reduce operational risk.
recommendations.clarifyApprovals: Clarify approval ownership for critical workflows.

faq.title: Responsibilities FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Responsibilities Center helps organizations clarify ownership across goals, decisions, follow-ups, approvals, integrations and other operational areas.
faq.backup: Why should responsibilities have backup owners?
faq.backupAnswer: Backup owners reduce operational risk by ensuring important responsibilities are covered when the primary owner is unavailable.
faq.autoAssignAnswer: No. Aipify may suggest ownership based on patterns and roles, but human administrators remain responsible for assigning ownership.

playbooks.title: Playbooks
playbooks.subtitle: Document, maintain and improve repeatable operational processes across your organization.
playbooks.loading: Aipify is preparing your organizational playbooks…
playbooks.principle: Standardized playbooks preserve institutional knowledge — human teams define and maintain procedures.
playbooks.emptyTitle: No playbooks have been created yet.
playbooks.emptyBody: Playbooks help organizations standardize recurring work and preserve operational knowledge.

recommendations.reviewOutdated: Review outdated playbooks that have not been updated recently.
recommendations.archiveUnused: Archive unused procedures that no longer reflect current operations.
recommendations.createRecurring: Create playbooks for recurring activities that lack documented procedures.
recommendations.updateAfterChanges: Update playbooks following major operational changes.
recommendations.activateDraft: Activate draft playbooks when procedures are ready for team use.

faq.title: Playbooks FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: A playbook is a documented process that helps organizations perform recurring activities consistently and efficiently.
faq.versionsAnswer: Version histories help organizations understand how processes evolve over time and support accountability.
faq.autoCreateAnswer: Aipify may suggest areas that could benefit from playbooks, but organizations remain responsible for defining and maintaining their procedures.

risks.title: Risks
risks.subtitle: Identify, document, review and manage operational risks with clarity and accountability.
risks.loading: Aipify is reviewing organizational risk information…
risks.principle: Prepared organizations respond with clarity — human teams own risk decisions and mitigation.
risks.emptyTitle: No organizational risks have been recorded yet.
risks.emptyBody: Documenting risks helps organizations prepare for uncertainty and strengthen resilience.

recommendations.assignOwner: Assign an owner to unmanaged risks.
recommendations.escalateCritical: Escalate critical unresolved risks for leadership attention.
recommendations.updateMitigation: Update mitigation strategies as conditions change.
recommendations.archiveResolved: Archive resolved risks to keep the register focused.

faq.title: Risks FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Risks Center helps organizations identify, monitor and manage operational risks through structured documentation and mitigation planning.
faq.howCalculatedAnswer: Risk levels combine likelihood and impact assessments to help organizations prioritize attention and mitigation efforts.
faq.eliminateAnswer: No. Aipify supports awareness and mitigation planning, but organizations remain responsible for managing risk appropriately.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.subtitle: Document policies, track acknowledgements, schedule reviews and maintain organizational compliance readiness.
compliance.loading: Aipify is reviewing your compliance information…
compliance.principle: Clear policies support readiness — Aipify does not provide legal advice.
compliance.emptyTitle: No policies have been created yet.
compliance.emptyBody: Compliance begins with clear expectations, documented policies and regular reviews.

recommendations.requestAcknowledgements: Request outstanding acknowledgements from relevant team members.
recommendations.archiveRetired: Archive retired policies to keep the register focused.

faq.title: Compliance FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Compliance Center helps organizations manage internal policies, acknowledgements and review schedules to improve operational readiness.
faq.legalAdviceAnswer: No. Aipify supports policy management and organizational awareness but does not replace professional legal advice.
faq.acknowledgementsAnswer: Acknowledgements help organizations demonstrate that relevant individuals have reviewed important policies and expectations.

externalRelationships.title: External Relationships
externalRelationships.subtitle: Manage suppliers, partners and service providers with structured ownership and lifecycle tracking.
externalRelationships.loading: Aipify is reviewing your external relationships…
externalRelationships.principle: Proactive relationship management strengthens resilience — humans retain vendor decisions.
externalRelationships.emptyTitle: No external relationships have been recorded yet.
externalRelationships.emptyBody: Managing external relationships helps organizations improve resilience and maintain continuity.

recommendations.assignOwner: Assign an owner to unmanaged vendors.
recommendations.scheduleRenewal: Schedule renewal discussions for upcoming contract dates.
recommendations.addBackupContact: Add backup contacts for important relationships.

faq.title: External Relationships FAQ
faq.whatIs: What is the External Relationship Center?
faq.whatIsAnswer: The External Relationship Center helps organizations manage important suppliers, partners and service providers through structured ownership and lifecycle tracking.
faq.owners: Why should vendor relationships have owners?
faq.ownersAnswer: Ownership improves accountability and reduces operational risk by ensuring important relationships receive appropriate attention.
faq.autoManageAnswer: No. Aipify helps organizations track important milestones and reminders, but humans remain responsible for relationship management decisions.

organizationalAssets.title: Assets & Resources
organizationalAssets.subtitle: Maintain visibility into important assets, subscriptions, licenses and shared resources.
organizationalAssets.loading: Aipify is reviewing your organizational assets…
organizationalAssets.principle: Operational awareness strengthens continuity — store references only, never credentials.
organizationalAssets.emptyTitle: No organizational assets have been recorded yet.
organizationalAssets.emptyBody: Tracking important assets improves resilience, accountability and operational awareness.

form.referenceNote: Store references and ownership only — never passwords or API credentials.

recommendations.addBackupOwner: Add backup ownership for important assets.

faq.title: Assets & Resources FAQ
faq.whatIs: What is the Assets & Resources Center?
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Assets & Resources Center helps organizations maintain visibility into important operational assets and shared resources.
faq.apiKeys: Should API keys be stored here?
faq.apiKeysAnswer: No. Store references and ownership information only. Sensitive credentials should remain in approved secret management systems.
faq.ownersAnswer: Ownership improves accountability and helps organizations maintain continuity when responsibilities change.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.subtitle: Document discussions, capture decisions and track follow-up actions from important meetings.
meetings.loading: Aipify is preparing your meeting information…
meetings.principle: Meeting effectiveness comes from documented outcomes — people execute agreed actions.
meetings.emptyTitle: No meetings have been recorded yet.
meetings.emptyBody: Aipify helps organizations turn conversations into outcomes.

recommendations.assignActionOwners: Assign owners to unresolved action items.
recommendations.recordOutcomes: Record meeting outcomes before closing the meeting.

faq.title: Meetings FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Meetings Center helps organizations document discussions, capture decisions and track follow-up actions resulting from important meetings.
faq.outcomes: Why should meeting outcomes be documented?
faq.outcomesAnswer: Documenting outcomes improves accountability, preserves organizational memory and increases the likelihood that important actions are completed.
faq.autoComplete: Can Aipify automatically complete meeting action items?
faq.autoCompleteAnswer: No. Aipify supports visibility and accountability, but people remain responsible for executing agreed actions.
